title: Lots of Fishing - PyroFishing
description: A unoffical texturepack for the PyroFishing plugin. There is not a official texturepack for the plugin so use this one for free!
body:
Unoffical Pyrofishing texturepack

The pack will contain every fish that is in the [PyroFishing](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/pyrofishing-1-9-x-1-16-x.47054/) plugin. 

Forge | [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) \
Fabric | [CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

If your server has custom fishes that you want textures for let me know by opening a [issue](https://github.com/BrownTurtleBear/TB-texturepack-help/issues).
